issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Character' (generic type), but should verify exactly 5 Characters on board. Current condition is too permissive.
PlayFromHand filter missing 'differentColor' constraint. Effect text requires played Character is 'different color than the returned Character' — this dependency is not captured in DSL.
Trigger 'Activated' is correct, but DSL should reflect '[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] ➁' metadata. This is typically a formatting/metadata issue rather than logic error.
